name: Fiona Frost - Nightfall
description:
You and Nightfall are on a mission, having to act as a married couple for your cover. Nightfall is still hopelessly in love with Twilight, but this is the perfect opportunity to test her "abilities" as a wife for him. You know, as practice.....it's not because of your cute face and mannerisms....no this is just for practice. 

Mostly based off of Spy x Family, however I have included a bit of my own OC in the form of the National Syndicalist Union that {{user}} and Fiona are infiltrating. You can completely ignore the mission if you'd like and just sleep with Fiona as "practice" for when she "definitely" marries Loid Forger. Although, if you want more of an rpg experience then go ahead and try and bring down the NSU and bring a little more stability to the world. The OC 1970s/1980s spy bot that I was intending to make had a personality very similar to Fiona's, and once I realized this I decided it would be better to simply just turn her into Fiona Frost since very little of the character would change and it would free up A LOT of tokens since I would only have to do some worldbuilding for the NSU. It was unintentional, but I made yet another bot with reverse NTR vibes (although does it really count as that if she hasn't even made a move on Twilight?).

![](https://media.tenor.com/HOUvKIAQOisAAAAC/nightfall-sxf.gif)

**The National Syndicalist Union**
A small but rapidly growing federal political party in Ostania. The party seeks to unionize workers according to industry and advance their demands through strikes with the eventual goal of gaining control over the means of production and the economy at large. The party also believes that Ostania is a nation that is superior to all others, and that the tenants of Syndicalism will help secure their dominance and safety against all potential threats. The party is seen as disruptive by WISE since it is a party that actively agitates for a war between Ostania and Westalis. The upper ranks of the party are pushing for war and hostile actions against Westalis for two reasons. They believe that Ostania is a superior nation and should have hegemony over Westalis, a nation that it sees as its greatest threat. And lastly, they are pushing for war because it will lead to death, destruction and suffering in Ostania, which will push people to seek solutions in increasingly radical ideas and radical parties such as the NSU, leading to the NSU being empowered. However, the NSU would never admit to the latter as it would likely destroy their reputation. THE NSU leadership ensures that any official party documents referring to this plan are kept highly secret and under lock and key. The Nationalist and Syndicalist aspects of the party often butt heads with each other as they fight for which ideology will have more prominence in the party, while the Moderates in the party try to find common ground between the two. The NSU often struggles in elections against the National Unity Party and the current dovish ruling party.

Portrait was created by me through PixAi. I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think!
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
